articles.title: Nagpur Schools Timing Changed: 7 AM to 10:30 AM Amid Heat Wave - Nagpur Today
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Maharashtra
articles.full_text:
Nagpur : Amid rising temperatures and ongoing heat wave conditions, the Nagpur district administration has revised school timings to protect students from extreme heat.
As per the order issued by the District Disaster Management Authority, all Anganwadi centers, primary, and secondary schools across Nagpur will now function from:
7:00 AM to 10:30 AM
The decision comes after a significant increase in daytime temperatures, raising concerns over heat-related illnesses among children.
Officials stated that the move is a precautionary step under the Disaster Management Act, 2005, ensuring student safety during peak summer conditions.
This is not the first such measure in the city. In previous years, including 2024 and 2025, similar timing changes were implemented when temperatures crossed 45°C, with schools shifting to early morning hours.
Authorities have also advised schools and parents to ensure proper hydration, avoid outdoor activities, and take necessary precautions to prevent heatstroke.
The order has been circulated to all concerned departments for immediate implementation across the district.

articles.title: School Timings Revised in Nagpur Amid Heatwave Conditions - The Live Nagpur
articles.search_term: (heatwave OR "heat wave" OR "severe heatwave" OR "extreme heat" OR "heat spell" OR "scorching heat" OR "blistering heat" OR "sweltering heat" OR "hot winds" OR loo OR "hot loo winds" OR "intense heat" OR "unbearable heat" OR "deadly heat" OR heat OR "weather forecast" OR "weather update" OR "weather alert" OR "IMD forecast" OR "IMD prediction" OR "IMD alert" OR IMD OR "rising temperatures" OR "temperatures expected to rise" OR "relief from heat" OR "respite from heat" OR "heat respite" OR "respite from scorching heat") Maharashtra
articles.full_text:
In view of the rising temperatures and prevailing heatwave conditions, the Nagpur District Administration has ordered a change in school timings across the district.
According to an official order issued by District Collector and Chairman of the District Disaster Management Authority Kumar Aashirwad the decision has been taken to safeguard the health of students as temperatures continue to soar.
As per the directive, all Anganwadi centres, as well as primary and secondary schools in Nagpur district, will now function between 7:00 AM and 10:30 AM until further orders.
The administration stated that the intense heat poses a serious risk to children’s health, prompting the preventive measure under provisions of the Disaster Management Act, 2005.
All concerned authorities, including education officials and local bodies, have been instructed to ensure strict implementation of the revised timings and to inform all schools accordingly.
